feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HR renewal dynamic rules with abap
entry.content:
Hi, has anyone tried to convert dynamic actions (defined in the view T588Z) into dynamic processing rules (DPRs) that are using standard ABAP routines like CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT in VC_T77PAODYRULE and succeeded?

Does SAP need to deliver the similar classes as the previous ABAP routines?

I'm trying to convert IT0000/06/93/F CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT(RP2006P0) and I have the error: Operation: 020 Class CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT(RP2006P0) does not exist 

Thanks

Sérgio

entry.title: Como validar un Hrform por característica HRFOR
entry.content:
Querida comunidad

Hemos diseñado un nuevo HRFORM para visualizar el recibo de pago por EC, actualmente podemos decidir por medio del la característica HRFOR por área de personal PERSK que área puede ver el nuevo diseño y cual no.

El problema que tenemos es que no podemos controlar la fecha de despliegue es decir, aun que mi área de personal que llamare XX tiene derecho a ver el nuevo diseño "Payslip_B" queremos que si el payslip que esta visualizando en EC es menor al año 2026 despliegue el "payslip_A".

Sabemos que EC ejecuta un ODATA para traer el payslip al portal.

Tiene alguna idea de como controlar el despliegue A o B basado en fecha de pago o año periodo de pago?

Gracias

entry.title: PPCI - Error when creating custom OM infotype
entry.content:
Hi,

I have done this so many times but somehow cannot get PPCI to create a custom OM Infotype. I am following the correct steps in creating a new custom OM Infotype but fail to PPCI to create the infotype. I keep on getting an error that "Structure HRI9106 exists" and "R3TR TABL HRI9106 exists" which does not make sense as the structure is required to generate the Infotype. Before i started I made sure that there are no entries in  T778T, T777D, and T777Z and not other structures or programs relating to that Infotype. I have tried using a random high 9 number as well, and it still gives the same error.

https://getsapdone.wordpress.com/2020/06/14/how-to-create-sap-om-infotype/

What am I missing?

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: Loan Application enabling from FIRIO with Infotype 0045
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have a requirement to build a Loan Application in Fiori with workflow process .

and after all approvals the loan request to be updated in the IT0045.

we have built a custom application and try updating IT0045 using Infotype update function module HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION 

but we are facing some issues.

I would like to understand if there is any standard Loan application in fiori if not is there seperate FM or BADi to update IT0045

entry.title: Enabling latest career worksheet in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
What should be the correct procedure to enable latest career worksheet?

As per the SAP document, these are the pre-requisites:

  1. Career Worksheet V12 is enabled in provisioning.
  2. Migrated to TIH and GF
  3. OM is enabled in provisioning

In the preview system, TIH and GF is already enabled. How to ensure that OM is enabled in provisioning and perform the rest of the upgrade. Is there anything available in the check tool?

Please respond to this 🙂

entry.title: Request for Insights: SuccessFactors RCM vs SmartRecruiters for PSU Recruiting
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like to initiate a discussion on identifying the most suitable recruiting solution for Indian PSU implementations—specifically evaluating SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Management (RCM) versus SmartRecruiters.

Considering the complexity and regulatory nature of PSU recruitment processes—such as reservation policies, audit requirements, large-scale hiring, and compliance-driven workflows—it is important that we assess which platform aligns best with these needs.

Additionally, with ongoing and upcoming innovations expected to be focused more on the SmartRecruiters platform, it becomes even more relevant to evaluate its suitability in comparison to RCM in the PSU context.

I request everyone to share their insights, experiences, and recommendations to help us arrive at a well-informed approach.

Looking forward to your valuable inputs.

Best regards,
Aravind

entry.title: Sailpoint to HCM Hire Action not working
entry.content:
Hello, 

Our connection from Sailpoint to HCM (on RISE) works for all updating actions except for the "Hire" action.  The connection to an HCM environment not on RISE works for all actions including hire. 

Has anyone else encountered this?

Thanks!

entry.title: Connect budget position approvals in SAP ERP with the opening of vacancies in RCM
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working on a proposal for a client running SAP ERP HCM on-premise (no Employee Central) who wants to implement SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Management (RCM).

Their key requirement is to connect budget position approvals in SAP ERP with the opening of vacancies in RCM. Specifically:

1. Bidirectional data flow of position budgets between SAP ERP and RCM (read and update budgeted positions and associated costs — similar to a PFR or Personnel Change Request flow).
2. Validate recruitment requests in RCM against ERP-approved budgets before allowing a requisition to be opened.
3. Automatically update SAP ERP when a position's status or cost changes in RCM.

My questions:
- Is there any standard/packaged integration from SAP that covers this scenario (SAP ERP HCM on-premise + RCM, without EC)?
- Does the standard Job Requisition Trigger Integration between RCM and SAP ERP HCM cover budget validation at all?
- If no standard solution exists, what is the recommended approach — SAP BTP Integration Suite (CPI), custom ABAP, or something else?

I've reviewed the SAP Help documentation on 'Integration of Recruiting with SAP ERP HCM' and the standard integration appears to cover only two flows: triggering a requisition from ERP position data, and sending the hired candidate back to ERP. I found no mention of budget validation or bidirectional cost updates.

Any experience or pointers to official documentation on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting HCM (Human Capital Management) HCM Fund/Position Management SAP Process Integration

entry.title: Need to change PCR Logic
entry.content:
Hi All,

In the attached PCR, we need to make some changes. If wage type 2601 contains any value greater than zero, then only this PCR should be processed.

How can we achieve this?

Thanks & regards

Nilesh

entry.title: Payroll posting to Finance
entry.content:
I have a query where I need clarification that I don't want to budget check few GL's in retro period payroll posting. 

Let's say I am running Payroll for May'26 and due to some master data changes payroll is going retro from Apr'25. My payroll calculation is perfectly fine but the problem is with the posting. When I am doing the posting, it is also going to retro period and checking for budget for few GL's where budget check is enabled. Have noticed that it is consuming the budget from Apr'25 and releasing the same in May'26 posting so ultimately it is balancing out the access amount which is not getting paid in current month.

Is there a way I can disable the budget check whenever retro period payroll posting is happening.

entry.title: Employee as BP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently in the Go-Live phase of our project, and the HR module has not yet been implemented. However, the customer has requested that their Sales Employees be created as Business Partners in the production system.

At present, can we create these Sales Employees as Business Partners without assigning the Employee role (BUP003)? If so, when SAP SuccessFactors (or the HR module) is implemented later, will it be possible to link these same Business Partner records to the HR employee master data instead of creating new records?

If this approach is feasible, I would appreciate guidance on the configurations, master data settings, and best practices that should be considered now to ensure a smooth future integration with SuccessFactors/HR. Specifically, I would like to understand any critical settings that should not be missed during the initial Business Partner creation process to avoid issues during employee synchronization and integration at a later stage.

Please share your recommendations and experiences.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Does the HCM Compatibility Pack expiry (May 31, 2026) apply to a Simple Finance 1503 (ERP 6.0 EhP7)?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

System: SAP Simple Finance, on-premise edition 1503 — technically SAP ERP 6.0 EhP7 (SAP_BASIS 740, per SAP Note 2117481), with classic ERP HCM on SAP_HR 604 / EA-HR.

My understanding is that the Compatibility Pack is an S4CORE-based SAP S/4HANA construct. Since Simple Finance 1503 is not S4CORE but part of SAP Business Suite 7, its HCM should follow Business Suite 7 maintenance (2027 / 2030) — not the May 31, 2026 Compatibility Pack expiry.

Questions:
1. Is it correct that the May 31, 2026 HCM Compatibility Pack expiry does NOT apply to a Simple Finance / S/4HANA Finance 1503 system?
2. Does the Compatibility Pack / H4S4_1 constraint only become relevant after conversion to S4CORE-based SAP S/4HANA (1511+)?
3. Is there an official SAP Note that explicitly distinguishes S/4HANA Finance (Business Suite based) from SAP S/4HANA (S4CORE) regarding the HCM Compatibility Pack?

Thanks for any official references.

entry.title: Inconsistence in payroll results (tables C1/RT)
entry.content:
Has anyone encountered the following error during an off-cycle posting?

I found a few KBAs that appear to be related, but I'm looking for a more detailed explanation of how to troubleshoot and resolve this issue, particularly when the Payroll Control Record has already been exited.

Any guidance on the checks that should be performed and the appropriate corrective actions would be greatly appreciated.

 

Inconsistence in payroll results (tables  C1/RT)

Message No. 3G101

Diagnosis

An inconsistency results has been found durin

entry.title: How do I add the role 'BUPSPD' to my employee BP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to add the BP role 'BUPSPD' (Sensitive PD Specialist) to my Business Partner that has been originated by creating an employee in PA30. If I want to do this in the BP transaction, I get the following error: 

BP Address Usage HCM001 can only be changed in HCM context.

Message No. /SHCM/EMPLOYEE_BL234

What are the steps to undertake to be able to assing this role to my employee BP?

Thanks in advance,

Aleksandr

entry.title: Unable to Import Job Info File Error: Contact the System Administrator
entry.content:
I import many files in HCM, import is failing in our DEV (sandbox1) and PROD environments, succeeding in our TEST (sandbox2) environment. 

Same file, different results.  The warning is indicating Fields (local-job-title] does not belong to country/region USA.  Ignoring the value for these fields.  

I removed this field and received no warning but:  The system has encountered an unknown error on import.  Please contact the System Administrator.

entry.title: SAP HCM to Third Party Integration (LIve)
entry.content: SAP HCM master data needs to be updated in our third-party systems.  How can this be achieved in real time? We are not able to find any time stamp or event triggered at the time of data change/update in infotypes? What is the SAP recommended approach for real-time HR master data update propagation to external systems? We are unable to find an SAP note.

entry.title: Payroll Posting to FI Error (3G103) After Processing Class 20 Correction on Wage Type 1419
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am facing an issue with Payroll Posting to FI in SAP HCM Payroll (International Payroll - MOLGA 99).

Background

During payroll processing for period 05/2026, wage type 1419 was configured with:

  • Processing Class 20 = 4 (incorrect)

After investigation, we found that the correct configuration should be:

  • Processing Class 20 = 3

The correction was transported and applied successfully.

Current Situation

  • Payroll for 06/2026 has been recalculated after the correction.
  • Posting to FI for 06/2026 works successfully.
  • However, posting to FI for 05/2026 still fails with error:

Message No. 3G103 - Accounting balance is not zero

The payroll results for May were generated before the correction of Processing Class 20.

Constraints

  • Payroll area is already closed for 05/2026.
  • We would like to avoid reopening and recalculating the entire May payroll if possible.
  • June payroll already contains the corrected configuration and FI posting works without issues.

Questions

  1. Is there any standard SAP method to regenerate posting results for period 05/2026 without a complete payroll recalculation?
  2. Can posting documents be rebuilt after a Processing Class 20 correction?
  3. Has anyone encountered a similar issue where a Processing Class change caused posting imbalance in a closed payroll period?
  4. What would be the recommended SAP best practice in this scenario?

Any guidance or experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

SAP HCM Payroll (International Payroll - MOLGA 99)

entry.title: ECP Custom Development
entry.content:
Hi,

We are about to start with the process of moving our on-prem ECC system to SAP SuccessFactors EC/ECP. We have been using SAP HR in ECC for about 24 years so as a big company we have lots of custom developments in the payroll space. I am familiar with SuccessFactors most of these custom developments wont be catered for in SuccessFactors. I am curious as to what type of development is allowed in ECP as its running on S/4 and what other companies have done with their custom infotypes and other WebDynpro and Fiori applications? How much custom development can you do on ECP? Did you move your Fiori applications to CAP or RAP applications? Are custom infotypes still allowed? I assume you can build ODATA services? Can you build custom programs for instance if you have a custom posting report, can you use that development on ECP as well? 

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: How Is AI Changing SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting in 2026?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm interested in hearing how organizations are using AI within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting.

Many companies are adopting AI for resume screening, candidate matching, interview scheduling, and recruitment analytics. While these capabilities can improve efficiency, I'm curious about the real-world experience.

  • Has AI reduced your time-to-hire?

  • Are recruiters finding better-quality candidates?

  • How do you balance AI recommendations with human decision-making?

  • What challenges have you encountered during implementation?

I'd love to hear your experiences, best practices, and lessons learned from using AI in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting.

entry.title: Custom Fields in Performance Form Appearing as Mandatory – Can They Be Made Optional?
entry.content: Hi Experts, I have created two custom fields in a Performance Management form and granted the necessary field permissions. The fields are available and editable in the form as expected. However, when the form is launched, both custom fields are appearing as mandatory, and users are required to complete them before proceeding. I would like these fields to be optional. Could you please advise: Is it possible to disable the mandatory behavior for custom fields?
